title: Redis Job Queue and Pub/Sub System
statement: Implement a Redis-based job queue and pub/sub system for a microservices architecture. Your API should support two endpoints: `POST /jobs` to enqueue a job, and `GET /stats` to retrieve Redis statistics for monitoring. Additionally, your system should use Redis pub/sub to broadcast job completion events to listening services. You will need to utilize Redis's built-in job queue (also known as a 'queue') and publish/subscribe features.
constraints: Must use the redis client provided in the starter code
Must implement Redis pub/sub for broadcasting job completion events

endpoints.description: Retrieve Redis statistics for monitoring. Response is in JSON format.
